characters.name: Alfred
characters.description: AlfredNameAlfredSexMaleRelationshipAnna Songthrush(ex-flame)First EpisodeFledging Day Alfredwas an old flame ofAnna Songthrushbefore she eventually married to Bertie's father,Henry. He's still obsessed with Anna and still wants to have sex with her, even if her daughter, Bertie is watching.

characters.name: Aunt Tallulah
characters.description: Aunt TallulahVoice ActorJenifer LewisSexFemaleSpeciesToco ToucanOccupationSocialiteFamilyTuca(niece)RelationshipTuca Toucan- NeiceTerry Toucan- NeiceThomas Aukberg- Nephew-in-lawTulip Toucan- Grand NeiceDesmond Toucan- NephewTamarind Toucan- NeiceTimbourine Toucan- NephewTruly Toucan†- SisterTruly's Unnamed Ex-Husband - Ex-Brother-in-lawFew Ex-HusbandsFirst EpisodePlumageLast EpisodeNighttime FriendAunt Tallulahis a minor character onTuca & Bertie. She isTuca'swealthy, abusive, and alcoholic maternal aunt. Aunt Tallulahis an adult female toucan with a slightly desaturated blue-grey body, a large white patch around her eyes, pink eyelids, and a warm orange beak with a splotch of black on the tip of her upper beak. She is slightly overweight and stands slightly taller than her niece, Tuca. Despite her few appearances, Aunt Tallulah has been shown to be a rude and abusive woman. She often berates her deceased sister and nieceTuca. She is an alcoholic and is especially abusive when intoxicated.

characters.name: Bertie Songthrush
characters.description: Roberta"Bertie" Songthrushis one of the two eponymous characters inTuca & Bertie. Bertie SongthrushCurrentMid 20sHigh SchoolVoice ActorAli WongNameRoberta SongthrushAge31AliasesBertie SongthrushFamily MembersAnna SongthrushUnnamed FatherBirthdayBorn in 1989-1990Residence629 Beat St, E Flockaway, Bird TownOccupationBakerApprentice to Chef Winter GarciaSenior Operations Analyst at Conde Nest (formerly, has not technically quit)Owner of Sweet Beak (formerly)Apprentice of Pastry Pete (formerly)First EpisodeThe Sugar Bowl  Bertieis an introverted, nervous songbird who seems to have a cautious approach to life. She is career-oriented, with a strong passion for baking. She's a loyal best friend toTuca, being readily available when she needs it, and is often the one who gets her out of trouble; recognizing that Tuca needs her. However, she does have a desire to start her own life and therefore moves in with her boyfriendSpeckle. However, she has trouble expressing her needs to other people, and she suffers from generalized anxiety.

characters.name: Bruce
characters.description: BruceNameBruceSexMaleSpeciesTurkey VultureFirst EpisodeThe Sugar Bowl Bruceis a recurring character inTuca & Bertie. He is one of the three upstairs neighbors ofTucaandBertie. He first appears inThe Sugar Bowl, inSeason 1. Serving as a "cautionary tale" type character, he's the living embodiment of no self-control. He has no sense of common decency, nonchalantly talking about his various acts of fornication and is usually seen carrying bagged liquor. He speaks with a throaty whisper voice. Even despite this, he still managed to have his way withTucatwicein the past and may have given herSex Bugsin the episode "The Sex Bugs." He is obsessive with Tuca, even he bought her urine.

She is one of Tuca's ex-mates. She succeed afterFiggy. Tuca was engaged to her shortly after only recently meeting her for the first time. Bunnyhas a hyper personality. She is also sexually active.

characters.name: Cliff
characters.description: CliffNameCliffSexMaleSpeciesOwlOccupationHang-GliderFirst EpisodeA Very Speckle Episode Cliffis an owlSpecklemet in the men's restroom at theBower & Bower Architecturebuilding. Speckle used to like to talk to Cliff in the restroom, even he hang-glided with Cliff with Cliff as the "hang-glider," but after he insultedBertieatCity Bird Liquorsbar, Speckle wants nothing to do with Cliff anymore and wants him out of his life.

characters.name: Dakota
characters.description: DakotaVoice ActorAmber RuffinNameDakotaSexFemaleSpeciesYellow CanaryFamilyUnnamed parentsFirst EpisodeThe New Bird Dakota Model Sheet Dakotais a minor character inTuca & Bertie.She makes her first appearance inThe New BirdinSeason 1. Dakotais a shy, somewhat naïve young country-gal. LikeBertie, she has anxiety and a passion for baking. She views Bertie as a role model, until she fails to warn her aboutPastry Petewhen he physically overpowered her and pushed her head towards a boiling pot. When he does that to her she drops the f-word and calls him a creep, showing she can stand up for herself.

characters.name: Dapper Dog
characters.description: Dapper DogVoice ActorReggie WattsNameDapper DogSexMaleSpeciesNova Scotia Duck Tolling Retriever (Dog)OccupationFervent Citizen VelocipedeFirst EpisodeThe Sugar Bowl Dapper Dog Model Sheet Dapper has a melodramatic demeanor as illustrated by his verbosity, regular Shakespearean-esque monologuing, and his tendency to howl loudly. He also has a pretentious edge, dictating an unnecessarily long-winded complaint about the potholes in Birdtown and excitedly asking Tuca to read it back to him as if it were his magnum opus.

characters.name: Desmond Toucan
characters.description: Desmond ToucanVoice ActorTunde AdebimpeNameDesmond ToucanSexMaleSpeciesToco ToucanOccupationFood ScientistFamilyTruly Toucan(mother) †Unnamed fatherTuca Toucan(sister)Terry Toucan(sister)Timbourine Toucan(sister)Tamarind Toucan(brother)Tulip(neice)Thomas Aukberg(brother in law)First EpisodePlumage(cameo)Corpse Week(official)Desmondis a supporting character inTuca & Bertieseason 2. Corpse Week(official) Desmond wears a green collar shirt with a striped tie and has a darker green sweater vest over, and light brown dress pants. He also sports red glasses. Desmond is a reserved and quiet individual. He prefers to keep things to himself by constantly reading a book of choice. When his loved ones bicker amongst each-other, he maintains a cool demeanor by focusing on his reading. When he does speak, he talks on a one to one conversation. Desmond seems to be considerate by handing a book to Bertie to relax when his family was arguing with each other at the dinner table.

characters.name: Dr. Joanne
characters.description: Dr. JoanneVoice ActorPamela AdlonAliasesBertie- CilentFirst EpisodeBird MechanicsLast EpisodeScreech Leeches Dr. Joanneis a recurring character inTuca & Bertie. She is currentlyBertie's therapist. She is an olive sparrow. Dr. Joanne wears a black blazer with pockets over a chartreuse top with dark magenta pants. She sports black heels with white laces and wears a pendant. She wears a watch on her right wrist. Not much is known about Dr. Joanne, she was introduce as a therapist duringSeason 2. Dr. Joanne seems to be calm and collective during therapy sessions with her clients. She is shown to be thoughtful and considerate towards others. She also shows to have a sense of humor when it comes to situations where her clients feel anxious or uncertain. She finds humor in pottery failed videos and gets excited when it comes to horror movies.

characters.name: Ebony Black
characters.description: Ebony BlackVoice ActorLaverne CoxNameEbony BlackSexFemaleSpeciesCommon RavenFamilySophie Black(daughter)Only EpisodeThe Sex BugsEbony Blackis a minor character whose only appearance is inThe Sex Bugs.She is the mother ofSophie Blackand an agent who works at the Center for Sex Bug Control. Ebony Blackis a raven woman who shares many characteristics with her daughter, Sophie Black. She has dark grey feathers with a lighter colored beak. She has narrow eyes with yellow sclera, and a few ruffled feathers on the back of her head.

characters.name: Figgy
characters.description: FiggyVoice ActorMatthew RhysNameFiggySexMaleSpeciesFig TreeOccupationInstructor or teacher of harassmentRelationshipTuca Toucan(Girlfriend)First EpisodeLeveling UpLast EpisodeThe Mole Figgyis a supporting character introduced at the beginningSeason 3. He wasTuca’sboyfriend until she breaks up with him due to his alcoholism and his not wanting to get help or change. In the episode “Somebirdy’s Getting Married” Figgy admitted to Tuca that he still has feelings for her as well as she does too and so they get back together. Figgyis an adult male fig tree. The only visible facial feature he has is a mouth. He wears a black sweater with the sleeves rolled up over a white collared shirt, dark blue jeans, and brown boots. Figgy is shown to be a soft-spoken, friendly, and caring individual. He loves Tuca for who she is and assures her he loves "all of her,” as opposed toKarawho wanted to control and change Tuca. However, by Figgy's own admission, he is a heavy drinker. He agrees to the rules Tuca sets in place for their relationship regarding it, as in he can’t drink in front of her or drink so much he’ll get admitted to the hospital. He lays down his own rule that she cannot ask him to quit drinking, because he can’t change. It’s revealed once a week he secluded himself and drinks heavily and soaks his roots in alcohol, putting him in a horrible drunken state that even makes his leaves fall off and his figs rotting. Tuca can’t bear to see him hurt himself and refuse help, so she breaks up with him.

characters.name: Henry Songthrush
characters.description: Henry SongthrushVoice ActorRandall ParkSexMaleSpeciesSongthrushFamilyAnna Songthrush(Wife)Bertie Songthrush(Daughter)First EpisodeCorpse Week Bertie Songthrush(Daughter) Like his wife,Henry Songthrushhas a cheerful demeanor, maybe more so than her, and he is also averse to discussing anything negative. This includes both sweeping Bertie being assaulted by a life guard when she was twelve, instead just having her go to the school counselor a few times then never bringing it up again, and in the present not telling Bertie that he had open breast surgery semi recently. When Bertie tells him that she’s been seeing a therapist , he happily tells her she doesn’t need therapy because she’s normal.

characters.name: Jessica
characters.description: JessicaNameJessicaSexFemaleSpeciesMothRelationshipMuriel Nocturna(best friend)First EpisodeScreech Leeches Jessicais a minor character inSeason 3ofTuca & Bertie. She isMuriel Nocturna's"real best friend" in high school and still considered her to be her best friend when they temporary split and Muriel start hanging out withBertiefor a couple of days until Muriel and Jessica eventually got back together. When she and Muriel got back together again, and this caused Bertie to be jealous of Jessica.

characters.name: Kara
characters.description: KaraVoice ActorSasheer ZamataRegularNurseNameKaraSexFemaleSpeciesHerring GullOccupationNurseRelationshipTuca(Ex-Girlfriend)Beth(Current Girlfriend)First EpisodeNighttime FriendLast EpisodeThe Mole Beth(Current Girlfriend) Karais a recurring character inSeason 2andSeason 3ofTuca and Bertie. She is a nurse whoTucameets inNighttime Friendand they eventually begin dating until the end of the season, when Kara's toxic behavior leads her to ghost and later dump Tuca inThe Flood. Kara on the surface appears as laid back, warm, and friendly. She works as a nurse, something that she brags about a lot, although in reality she’s has some questionable ethics as she talks about the crazy stories and patients she’s seen there, even showing photos, possibly without permission and violating their privacy and multiple patients she’s worked with have even died. After inviting Tuca to her place for the first time, she sings her a lullaby as the former lays her head down in her lap. She’s also quite sociable and extroverted, seeing as she has multiple female friends that she refers to as "her girls." However, inSleepoversafter she and Tuca start dating, her toxic side slowly starts to creep out. Kara disregards Tuca's feelings after she unintentionally makes an insensitive "joke" asking "Who raised you?" and doesn’t apologize when Tuca says it hurt her feelings, with Kara assuring herself she’s in the right because she said it in a joking manner. Kara generally acts emotionally manipulative and looks down on others, getting upset at Tuca for wanting to go to a music show with Bertie when the latter invites her. She goes on telling Tuca she wants to be able to spend her free time with her since she works long hours as a nurse, and retorts that Tuca doesn’t have a job when Tuca asks if she expects her to work around her schedule. She later "apologizes" by saying she doesn’t want things to be weird with them, and giving Tuca a strawberry milkshake pin for her fanny pack. Kara's emotional abuse becomes more apparent inDancewhere it’s shown Tuca has been attempting to change everything about herself, ranging from her clothing choices to her personality in order to please her. Kara is openly shown being condescending and showing disdain towards Tuca and for her friends and interests, and the carnival itself. Her more pretentious side is also shown when she constantly has to point out that the carnival is full of germs and repeatedly reminds everyone she's a nurse. She does not even attempt to act like she wants to be at the carnival, despite Tuca always doing what she wants to do and generally does not reciprocate, agreeing to participate in something Tuca enjoys in return. It’s also revealed Kara has been giving Tuca pins every time they have a "disagreement," and it’s shown Tuca's fanny pack is now covered in the collection she has acquired. After Tuca finally stands up for herself Kara blames her attitude on being busy as a nurse, and says she's had issues with other p

Coach Meredithis swim coach from Bertie's old summer camp who has much wisdom and acts like a mentor to Bertie.

characters.name: Muriel Nocturna
characters.description: Muriel NocturnaVoice ActorVictoria MoralesAdultTeenagerSexFemaleSpeciesBatOccupationFilmmakerFamilyUnnamed ParentsUnnamed SonRelationshipBertie Songthrush(Ex Best-Friend)Jessica(Other High School Best Friend)First EpisodeScreech Leeches Muriel Nocturnais a minor character introduced inSeason 3ofTuca & Bertie. She is an acclaimed horror director, andBertie'sformer goth best friend from high school whom she got too clingy to. MurielNocturnais a female bat with a goth style. She has white fur with light yellow fur on and inside her ears and her snout, with small fangs that stick out of her mouth. She has bangs that cover her forehead. Her design is likely based on aHonduran white bat. As a teenager,Muriel Nocturnawas shown to be friendly and peppy towards Bertie, as she came to check on Bertie after hearing her crying in the girl's restroom "all the way from the art wing" and even offered Bertie to talk to her about her troubles. However, she is slowly revealed to have some toxic and manipulative qualities, such as getting Bertie get into shoplifting and at some point, even kissed Bertie, only to start distancing herself afterwards. At the climax of Bertie's memories, she becomes upset at the fact that Bertie got "most gothiest" in the yearbook and lashes out at her, apparently not seeing Bertie fit to being goth due to her liking the color pink and "rom-coms and boy bands." She reveals that she was never truly Bertie's friend and that she only hung out with her out of pity. When she finally started hanging out with Jessica again, she started to considered Bertie to be a mimicking stalker, even though she's the one got Bertie into goth subculture and fashions in first place, when she was temporary hanging out with her. As an adult, she seems to be a more mellowed and still has a liking for dark themes, such as clothing and produces horror movies. However she also seemed tired and still dislikes "clingy" attention from others, as such when she shows displeasure from her own son's adoration towards her and the fact he mimics her.

characters.name: Pastry Pete
characters.description: Pastry PeteVoice ActorReggie WattsNamePastry PeteSexMaleSpeciesEmporer PenguinOccupationPatisserieFamilyNephewRelationshipUnnamed ex-wife Pastry Peteis a recurring, minor character inTuca & Bertie. He is voiced byReggie Watts. Pete is arrogant and thinks little of people around him. Pastry Pete helpsBertieandDakotaknead dough, standing too close and touching their arms too much. He talks authoritatively and tends to force his apprentices to do things without their consent or even asking them in the first place. Pete is also shown to be mysoginistic in his tendencies have no respect for women. This shows heavily when he forces each woman's face in the experimental banana roux, pushing their heads closer and closer to the steaming pot under the guise of having them smell and see it better. In reality, it is to show his dominance over them.

characters.name: Pat
characters.description: PatVoice ActorIsabella RosselliniNamePatSexFemaleSpeciesBarn OwlFamilyCoach Meredith Maple(wife)RelationshipMarried toCoach Meredith MapleOnly EpisodeThe Jelly LakesPat makes a one-time appearance inThe Jelly Lakes, inSeason 1. She is the wife ofCoach Maple. Pat is a female barn owl with a short and stout physique. She has a heart-shaped face with orange eyes and a downwards-facing beak. She has a beige-white coat of feathers with light brown speckling on her head, chest, and hands. She wears a white collared wrap shirt, beaded necklace, a yellow skirt that is ankle length, and grey sandals. Pat is a humble and creative old woman who enjoys using the delicate art of arranging paper mosaics inside old eggshells as a way to express herself. She's easily pleased byTuca'scheesy jokes, responding in uproarious giddy laughter similar to the call of an owl. Little else is known about her.
